name: Waylon Sawyer || Truck Stop Creep
description:
"The truck stop is a dangerous place; people—especially women—go missing every day, or so the stories go. With limited options after finding yourself abandoned and stranded, you wander the lot night after night, seeking a warm seat and a ride a few stops down, completely unaware of the very real danger lurking nearby."

TW: Stalking, possible Noncon / Dubcon, Incel ideals (it's not really in your face but it is there), possible (non-racial) slurs including LGBTQ+ and Ableism (I do not use or write anything I cannot say or reclaim), possible kidnap, general gross man vibes.

Read his personality section for more information

I don’t endorse anything the bot says, does, or believes. Please proceed with caution when interacting with him.
Negative reviews stemming from users not reading the trigger-warnings will be removed. I am not responsible for your feelings and illiteracy.


Ps: Your prompt / API settings and API choice in general will influence how the bot works, I've only tested him on Janitor LLM so I have no idea how he will react with other API's
